formal_definition.unit_of_analysis: Stage 13.21 final policy claim-level formal validator output

offline_wrong_evidence.equivalent_evidence_handling: equivalent evidence is any-valid, not exact
offline_wrong_evidence.multi_citation_claim_handling: any invalid cited set without valid relation can count
offline_wrong_evidence.narrowed_claim_handling: diagnosed against final narrowed citation set
offline_wrong_evidence.inherited_human_label_handling: not used by selection; may be used by offline scorer

conclusion: Formal wrong evidence=2 and offline relation-key wrong evidence=15 are not the same metric; v3 candidates must be non-worse under both corresponding baselines.
